programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China's perspective, policies and stories.

programme.title: Full Frame
programme.desc: Full Frame enriches the lives of viewers through animated discussion of film, arts and culture, and social trends etc impacting a diverse global audience.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Zoom in
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.desc: Faces of Africa is a topical magazine that showcases the diversity of the continent.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S5 Ep7
programme.desc: Steve Grahame zabiera swojego nowego psa, Bellę, w długą drogę do Alice Springs. Zespół Nitro Funny Cars pędzi 3 tys. km przez Australię, aby zdążyć na jedno z największych dorocznych wydarzeń.

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S5 Ep8
programme.desc: Mackay House Movers wykonują jedno ze swoich największych zleceń w historii firmy. Steve Grahame przeżywa koszmar w drodze przez równinę Nullarbor: ma problemy z wynajętym kierowcą i z własnym psem.

programme.title: Australijscy poszukiwacze złota
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Australijscy poszukiwacze złota S2 Ep6
programme.desc: Ekipa Dirt Dogs trafia na coś, co może okazać się znaleziskiem życia. Henri i Kellie walczą z pogodą — i ze sobą nawzajem. Zespół Gold Gypsies jest w poważnym niebezpieczeństwie.

programme.title: Drwale z Kolumbii Brytyjskiej
programme.desc: Sprawy przybierają zły obrót. Brat Craiga, Brent, pożycza maszynę do wyrębu lasu, co prowadzi do ryzykownej sytuacji. Dan Millar, drwal-weteran, usiłuje dotrzeć do tartaku mimo trudnych warunków.

programme.title: Za kratami: najcięższe więzienia na świecie
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Więzienie La Mesa, Meksyk
programme.desc: Za kratami więzienia La Mesa w Meksyku siedzą handlarze narkotyków i zabójcy. Panują tu twarde zasady...

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S5 Ep9
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell i jego zespół podejmują się największej misji w historii. Niedawno zalane drogi sprawiają kłopoty Steve'owi Grahame'owi. Mick King przewozi 15-miesięczną żyrafę do nowego domu.

programme.title: Z samolotu do sieci
programme.desc: Poznajemy niezwykle złożony świat lotniska. To tutaj największe i najszybsze pojazdy na świecie poruszają się w jednej, stosunkowo niewielkiej przestrzeni: każdy błąd może doprowadzić do katastrofy.

programme.title: Australijscy poszukiwacze złota
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Australijscy poszukiwacze złota S2 Ep6
programme.desc: Ekipa Dirt Dogs trafia na coś, co może okazać się znaleziskiem życia. Henri i Kellie walczą z pogodą — i ze sobą nawzajem. Zespół Gold Gypsies jest w poważnym niebezpieczeństwie.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Więzienie La Mesa, Meksyk
programme.desc: Za kratami więzienia La Mesa w Meksyku siedzą handlarze narkotyków i zabójcy. Panują tu twarde zasady...

programme.title: Drwale z Kolumbii Brytyjskiej
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Kłopoty w głębi lasu
programme.desc: Craig jest sfrustrowany niekończącymi się awariami, kierowca walczy z chroniczną kontuzją pleców, aby nie przerywać pracy, a przyczepa do przewozu drewna wypada z drogi.

programme.title: Z samolotu do sieci
programme.desc: Dramatyczne nagrania z telefonu pokazują, jak wygląda pożar na pokładzie lecącego samolotu. Dowiemy się, jak strażacy radzą sobie z pożarami w lotnictwie.

programme.title: Australijscy poszukiwacze złota
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Australijscy poszukiwacze złota S2 Ep7
programme.desc: Rick Fisher ma do czynienia z parą zółtodziobów, a Ted i Lecky pracują nad twardą skałą. Kiedy ekipa Dirt Dogs łapie na gorącym uczynku grupę kłusowników, robi się naprawdę gorąco!

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S5 Ep10
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell i jego zespół pracują nad dostarczeniem wartej 8 milionów dolarów elektrowni na mikronezyjską wyspę. Sludge wyrusza w australijski outback, aby dostarczyć niezbędne paliwo.

programme.title: Drwale z Kolumbii Brytyjskiej
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Kłopoty w głębi lasu
programme.desc: Craig jest sfrustrowany niekończącymi się awariami, kierowca walczy z chroniczną kontuzją pleców, aby nie przerywać pracy, a przyczepa do przewozu drewna wypada z drogi.

programme.title: Drewno z Kolumbii Brytyjskiej
programme.desc: Ekipa Peters Contract Logging kończy wycinkę na dużej wysokości - tę samą, którą musiała porzucić trzy lata temu. Firma Integrated Operations rozpoczyna operację transportu pni za pomocą śmigłowca.

programme.title: Z samolotu do sieci
programme.desc: Dramatyczne nagrania z telefonu pokazują, jak wygląda pożar na pokładzie lecącego samolotu. Dowiemy się, jak strażacy radzą sobie z pożarami w lotnictwie.

programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.12
programme.desc: Take a sneak peak at the night life of the Wildlife.

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.4
programme.desc: Get up close and personal with the creatures that call your backyard home.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Storm Hunters | Shear Strength
programme.desc: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.

programme.title: Kobiety, które tworzyły historię - Elżbieta I - Poślubiona Anglii
programme.desc: W epoce zdominowanej przez mężczyzn królowa Elżbieta I była jedyną kobietą. Rządziła Anglią przez 45 lat, kładąc podwaliny pod Imperium Brytyjskie, a kiedy zmarła w 1603 roku, nadała imię całej epoce: epoce elżbietańskiej.

programme.title: Kobiety, które tworzyły historię - Kleopatra
programme.desc: Dowodziła armiami i budowała okręty wojenne. Była bezwzględna wobec rywali i szybko eliminowała zdrajców. Mówiła w co najmniej dziewięciu językach, przyjmowała dyplomatów i negocjowała z królami. Ale ostatnia kobieta, która rządziła Egiptem, jest dziś legendą ze względu na jej moc uwodzenia. Jej historia dostarczyła materiału do niezliczonych powieści i filmów. Mit Kleopatry żyje nadal, a jej wygląd kojarzyć się będzie juz zawsze z wyglądem Elizabeth Taylor w epickim filmie z 1963 roku. Prawdziwa Kleopatra być może nie była tak pełna gracji; jej atrakcyjność była bardziej kwestią inteligencji i siły woli. I udało jej się zdobyć najpotężniejszych Rzymian swoich czasów.

programme.title: William i Kate - rok później
programme.desc: 29 kwietnia 2011 roku William i Catherine pobrali się na bajkowym ślubie, który obejrzało ponad dwa miliardy ludzi i który świętował cały świat.

programme.title: Joanna d'Arc - Wyzwolicielka Francji
programme.desc: Joanna d'Arc – Wyzwolicielka Francji – Pierwsza kobieta, która przeszła do historii zachodniej cywilizacji. Wierzyła, że ma boską misję i uratowała Francję w mrocznych dniach wojny stuletniej. Dziewczyna z ludu, która przeciwstawiła się wszystkim instytucjom swoich czasów.

programme.title: Filip - Książę, Mąż, Ojciec
programme.desc: Kiedy zmarł, kilka tygodni przed jego setnymi urodzinami, kraj uczcił zaangażowanie księcia Filipa wobec królowej i pełnienie obowiązków, a przyjaciele i rodzina złożyli ostatni wyraz szacunku. Wykorzystując rzadkie materiały archiwalne i nagrania audio, film daje Philipowi okazję do opowiedzenia o swoim życiu, pracy, rodzinie, monarchii, środowisku i mediach. Opowiada także o swojej roli męża, relacjach z mediami i sposobie, w jaki nadzorował edukację swoich dzieci.

programme.title: Królowa Danii - Prywatne życie
programme.desc: Królowa Małgorzata obchodziła swoje 80. urodziny w 2020 roku - to doskonała okazja, aby przyjrzeć się bardziej nieformalnej stronie Jej Królewskiej Mości i dowiedzieć się więcej o jej zainteresowaniach sztuką, kulturą i historią.

programme.title: Królowa Elżbieta II - Życie w służbie
programme.desc: Ten dokument przedstawia niezwykłe życie królowej Elżbiety II – monarchini, której panowanie stało się symbolem stabilności, obowiązku i ciągłości w czasach gwałtownych zmian. Film prowadzi widza od młodości przyszłej królowej, przez moment objęcia tronu, aż po dekady pełne politycznych, społecznych i rodzinnych wyzwań. Dzięki archiwalnym materiałom i komentarzom ekspertów poznajemy Elżbietę II nie tylko jako głowę państwa, lecz także jako kobietę, która przez całe życie podporządkowała sprawy osobiste służbie Koronie i narodowi. To poruszający portret monarchii widzianej przez pryzmat odpowiedzialności, tradycji i cichej determinacji.

programme.title: Przyszłe królowe Europy
programme.desc: Przyszłe królowe Europy – kim są młode następczynie tronów, które już wkrótce obejmą władzę? Ten dokument przedstawia sześć wyjątkowych księżniczek: księżniczkę Wiktorię i Estelle ze Szwecji, Ingrid Alexandrę z Norwegii, Amalię z Holandii, Leonorę z Hiszpanii oraz Elżbietę z Belgii.

programme.title: Księżna Diana - życie po śmierci
programme.desc: Księżna Diana - życie po śmierci różni się od wielu ostatnich filmów upamiętniających 20. rocznicę śmierci księżnej Diany. To nie tylko dokument rocznicowy. To potężne podsumowanie historycznego, politycznego i społecznego dziedzictwa księżnej Diany.

programme.title: Rodzina Grimaldich: szlachectwo zobowiązuje
programme.desc: Książęca rodzina z Monako, ze swoim przepychem, nieszczęściami i skandalami, od dziesięcioleci znajduje się w centrum uwagi mediów. Luksus, odrzutowce i hazard - rodzina Grimaldi otacza się blichtrem i przepychem jak żadna inna arystokratyczna dynastia w Europie.

programme.title: Korona Szwecji
programme.desc: Król Karol Gustaw objął rządy pod tym hasłem. Równouprawnienie od dawna jest dla szwedzkiej rodziny królewskiej ważną wartością. W 1980 r. zmieniono prawo dotyczące dziedziczenia tronu i wprowadzono równe prawa do dziedziczenia dla mężczyzn i kobiet. Małżeństwa ze „zwykłymi ludźmi" również stały się tradycją. Szwedzkie dzieci królewskie mogą poślubić kogokolwiek zechcą. Sam król dał przykład, poślubiając Silvię Sommerlath z Heidelbergu w 1976 roku.

programme.title: Królewska historia miłosna - Elżbieta i Jerzy
programme.desc: Historia króla Jerzego VI i królowej Elżbiety, Matki Królowej, to opowieść o miłości, wsparciu i obowiązku. Razem zapewniali stabilność i ciągłość brytyjskiej monarchii w czasie II wojny światowej i później.

programme.title: Książe Harry - Ten Drugi
programme.desc: Jeśli Pałac myślał, że rok 2023 będzie spokojniejszy po dramacie i tragedii z 2022 roku, to wydanie autobiografii księcia Harry'ego Spare prawie zniszczyło wszelkie nadzieje. Książka wywołała międzynarodowy szał wśród mediów i opinii publicznej. Opinia jest teraz bardziej podzielona niż kiedykolwiek na temat tego, czy książę Harry powinien zachować swoje królewskie tytuły. Chociaż Harry i Meghan uciekli z rodziny królewskiej, aby mieć drugą szansę na prywatne życie, którego zawsze pragnęli, świat nie pozwolił im odejść po cichu. Pomimo ich ucieczki, ciągła uwaga mediów spowodowała lawinę nagłówków, rozpalając plotki po skandalicznych plotkach na temat pary i rodziny królewskiej. Aby...

programme.title: Harry i Meghan - wielka przepaść
programme.desc: Harry i Meghan uciekli z rodziny królewskiej, aby mieć drugą szansę na prywatne życie, którego zawsze pragnęli. Ale pomimo ich ucieczki świat wciąż opowiadał i powtarzał ich historię.

programme.title: Kate - Droga do Bycia Nowoczesną Królową
programme.desc: Łącząc niezwykłe materiały filmowe i wywiady z ekspertami, ten autorski dokument przedstawia prawdziwą historię Kate Middleton, pozornie zwyczajnej młodej kobiety, której przeznaczeniem stało się zostać królową Anglii. Pochodząca ze stosunkowo skromnych warunków rodzina Middleton nie mogła bardziej różnić się od rodziny królewskiej. Jednak właśnie tego chciał William - królewskiego życia połączonego z wygodną stabilnością małżeńską i kontynuacją łatwiejszych relacji z Brytyjczykami, zapoczątkowanych przez jego matkę, Dianę.

programme.title: Niezwykłe życie księcia Filipa
programme.desc: To nowy i wyrazisty portret człowieka, który często był przedmiotem sprzecznych opinii - a jednak jest najpopularniejszym członkiem rodziny królewskiej wśród pracowników Pałacu Buckingham, którzy kochają go i uważają za "człowieka z ludu".

programme.title: Król Karol III: Nowa Era
programme.desc: Królowa Elżbieta II nie żyje. Zachodzi słońce nad drugą wielką erą Elżbiety. Książę Walii wstępuje na tron i zostaje królem Karolem III. Nastała nowa era; panuje nowoczesna monarchia. W nigdy wcześniej nie widzianym wywiadzie, były kamerdyner króla Karola, Grant Harrold, obecnie sensacja mediów społecznościowych, maluje intymny portret nowego monarchy, dając wgląd w człowieka, który zostanie koronowany na króla w pierwszej koronacji od 70 lat. W wywiadzie z redaktorem naczelnym Majesty Magazine i płodnym królewskim biografem, Ingrid Seward opisuje poruszające momenty odejścia królowej, będąc świadkiem z pierwszej ręki niektórych z najbardziej historycznych momentów w najnowszej historii...

programme.title: Letizia - Królowa Hiszpanii
programme.desc: Hiszpanie poznali Letizię jako prezenterkę głównego programu informacyjnego. Małżeństwo z Felipe z Hiszpanii zapoczątkowało dla niej zupełnie inne życie. Dla byłego wybitnego dziennikarza sama reprezentacja nie wystarczy. Letizia chce być królową XXI wieku, z wymaganiami zawodowymi i własną pozycją. Zdrowie, żywienie, edukacja i prawa kobiet to zagadnienia, w które jest głęboko zaangażowana, wyraźnie pokazując swoje stanowisko. Spotkania, wyjazdy, przemówienia – wszystko przygotowywane jest z precyzją przy własnym stole. Pierwszy dokument o nowej królowej Hiszpanii.

programme.title: Następca Tronu Danii
programme.desc: Co to znaczy dorastać ze świadomością, że nigdy nie będzie się w stanie wybrać własnej kariery? Jak zdefiniować siebie w świecie, który ma już krystalicznie czysty obraz tego, kim jesteś i kim będziesz?

programme.title: Książęta Pałacu
programme.desc: Film Książęta Pałacu, przedstawia życie książąt z brytyjskiej rodziny królewskiej i ich znaczenie w rodzinie Windsorów. Profil książąt Filipa, Karola, Williama, Harry'ego i małego księcia Jerzego. Wyprodukowany przez Screenbound Productions (A2B Media), specjalistę od filmów dokumentalnych o brytyjskiej rodzinie królewskiej (Królowa Elżbieta: The Diamond Celebration, Diana Princess of Wales - A Life on the Edge), ten dokument zawiera wyjątkowe wywiady z królewskimi biografami, korespondentami i ludźmi, którzy pracowali z rodziną królewską. Dzięki temu, widz otrzymuje wgląd w to, jak królewscy książęta będą kształtować brytyjską monarchię i jej przejście od królowej Elżbiety, najdłużej...

programme.title: Historia Wallis Simpson
programme.desc: Poznaj Hugo Vickersa, królewskiego historyka królowej Elżbiety. Bliskie relacje Hugo z rodziną królewską zapewniają fascynujący wgląd w to, co działo się za kulisami. Dowiadujemy się, jak członkowie rodziny królewskiej postrzegali Wallis i intymne szczegóły z życia księcia i księżnej. Słyszymy także od członków rodziny i innych osób o przeszłości Wallis, odkrywając nową stronę historii, która nigdy wcześniej nie była opowiadana.

programme.title: Modowi Giganci
programme.desc: Dokument przedstawia sylwetki wybitnych postaci przemysłu modowego i finansowe aspekty tegoż biznesu.

programme.title: Gospodarka Zachodu
programme.desc: Na zachodzie znajdziemy jednych z największych lub przynajmniej najbardziej ekscentrycznych wynalazców świata. To rzemiosło jest seksowną bestią popychającą maszyny do granic możliwości. Jeśli spojrzeć na pustynię Mojave w USA lub Wielką Brytanię z czasów drugiej wojny światowej, to są to miejsca, które pławią się w inżynierskiej pasji i oferują wolność niestrudzonym majsterkowiczom.

programme.title: Kto Rządzi Ameryką
programme.desc: Polityczny film dokumentalny w wersji z polskim lektorem

programme.title: Token - przyszłość systemu ekonomicznego
programme.desc: Świat finansów podlega ciągłym zmianom. Wraz z postępem cyfryzacji w XXI wieku proces ten gwałtownie przyspieszył i otworzył nowe możliwości myślenia o finansach.

programme.title: Dilerzy: pierwszy kartel narkotykowy Ameryki
programme.desc: Dokument Setha Ferrantiego, byłego więźnia i filmowca, odsłania historię pierwszych karteli narkotykowych w USA – od czasów prohibicji po narodziny wojny z narkotykami. To fascynująca podróż przez mroczne korzenie amerykańskiego podziemia i jego wpływ na współczesne oblicze kraju.

programme.title: Szwajcaria i krypto rewolucja
programme.desc: Trzymający w napięciu dokument o kryptowalucie w Szwajcarii: Szwajcaria i krypto rewolucja. Jak odrodzą się banki i rządy?

programme.title: Eksperyment Bitcoin
programme.desc: Po globalnym kryzysie gospodarczym coraz więcej osób kwestionuje sposób funkcjonowania światowych rynków. Niektórzy zwracają się ku zdecentralizowanym systemom płatności, takim jak bitcoin, próbując odzyskać kontrolę nad gospodarką. Ale czym jest bitcoin?

programme.title: Pajęcza Sieć - Drugie Imperium Brytyjskie
programme.desc: Jak Wielka Brytania przekształciła się z największego imperium kolonialnego w nowoczesną potęgę finansową.

programme.title: Kto Rządzi Ameryką Part 2
programme.desc: Spojrzenie na tak zwany demokratyczny system rządzenia w Stanach Zjednoczonych Ameryki, ujawniający rzeczywiste siły, które rządzą narodem.

programme.title: Zeitgeist - Krok w przyszłość
programme.desc: Krok w przyszłość. Pełnometrażowy film dokumentalny w wersji z polskim lektorem. Film przedstawia argumenty za odejściem od obecnego społeczno-ekonomicznego paradygmatu monetarnego, który rządzi całym światem.

programme.title: Tajemnica potęgi Chin - Ep1
programme.desc: Odkryj niezwykłą ewolucję chińskiego krajobrazu miejskiego, gdy kraj rozpoczyna jeden z największych projektów urbanistycznych we współczesnej historii. W tym odsłaniającym wiele odcinku badamy, jak obszary wiejskie przekształcane są w nowoczesne metropolie zaprojektowane tak, by wspierać miliony ludzi – przy jednoczesnym uwzględnianiu kwestii środowiskowych i wyzwań społecznych.

programme.title: Legendy Internetu
programme.desc: W tym dokumencie opowiadamy historie założycieli największych firm internetowych.

programme.title: Samodzielni
programme.desc: Dokument przedstawia sylwetki czterech osób, które zmieniły się w self-made celebrytów i gigantów biznesu.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 He Said He Said Fight
programme.desc: A code red call blares after a fight occurs in the jail’s dorms. Accused of trespassing, a woman removes her clothes from her holding cell. A man is brought into detox after slamming against a cop car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E01 Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claims that they didn’t know the car they are driving is stolen. Occupants of a vehicle claim that all of the contraband found in their car is medical equipment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspicious driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a funny walking motorist is hiding something in his shoe.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood ‘Old West’ style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom. A prostitute fresh out of jail protests that he’s not trying to return to his old career.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver is stopped with suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E11 First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers expose an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she’s just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike then tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight about a road rage incident using rocks and a baseball bat. Suspects in a stopped car attempt to hide all the evidence against them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E16 My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs. A man begs not to be arrested so that he can pay child support.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E18 Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked. A woman asks for officers to help her rescue cats from a trailer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E20 Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit’s help.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E21 Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant. A man is threatened with violence when he refuses to turn his car’s headlights off.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E22 And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E01 She Came Onto Me
programme.desc: An undercover police officer sets up a sting to buy drugs. Officers find a surprise in a suspect’s trunk. A man claims that a prostitute has kidnapped him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police set up a undercover operation to bust a suspect who wants to hire a hit man to kill her husband. Unknown to her, the hit man she hired is an undercover police officer. The suspect denies doing anything wrong despite all of her crimes being caught on camera.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E06 Sharp Knives and Dirty Donuts
programme.desc: A customer pulls out a knife when asked to leave the store. A man doing donuts in a motel parking lot is questioned about a love triangle. Officers are flagged down by a man who was shot at while riding his bike.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E07 No Shirt, Lots of Service
programme.desc: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E08 You've Gotta Believe Me
programme.desc: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect in a traffic stop decides to handle the situation by screaming at the police. Officers have a close encounter with a suspect who admits that he has hidden contraband. A man’s clothing choices tip police off to possible criminal behavior.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect flees from police and attempts to hide contraband from them. A driver is pulled over and is literally covered in his crimes. An employee of a cell phone store attempts to scam the police and her employers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E11 A Song of Fire and Cleaning
programme.desc: The pursuit of a criminal driver ends in a fire and police rescue. Police track down an elusive suspect. A family dispute over cleaning a garage ends with the police being called.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rather than stop, a driver decides to lead police on a high-speed chase. A woman is shot at by her ‘sugar daddy.’ A fleeing suspect dumps a suspicious liquid out of his window.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called when two intoxicated suspects decide to have some fun and vandalize a fence. Undercover officers set up a narcotics sting at a hotel. A man is found lying naked in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Despite driving a large SUV and trailer, a suspect tries to outrun the police. A driver tries to hide contraband on his person. Police are called into a domestic dispute involving a husband and wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E15 All The World's Our Bedroom
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers set up a sting operation using a taxi cab in to bust prostitution. A man claims he can’t remember his ‘girlfriend’s’ name when officers suspect the woman is actually a stranger. Female undercover officers set up a sting operation to bust johns.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E19 Make it a Large Soda
programme.desc: A motorcyclist refuses to stop for the police and later tries to escape on foot. A pedestrian is found to have a large soda cup full of anything but soda. A man calls for police help when he’s verbally attacked on a city bus.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E20 A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
programme.desc: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers break up a fight between a couple in the middle of the street. Not even a church is immune to being robbed. A dispute between neighbors involves deadly weapons.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E22 Shots in the Big Easy
programme.desc: In New Orleans, police respond to a shots fired call. A suspect peddles a bike on the wrong side of the road with his girlfriend on the handlebars. A woman reports her husband to the police when he throws her down the stairs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E03 Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Poznaj Toma, wynalazcę z Samochodzikowa! W swoim nowoczesnym laboratorium tworzy wynalazki, aby rozwiązać problemy przyjaciół.

programme.title: Tom's Garage
programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck pomaga swoim przyjaciołom z Car City, gdy ci potrzebują naprawy. Zawsze daje im coś specjalnego po każdej pracy.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Zatrzymaj się w warsztacie Toma Holownika! Ten kreatywny malarz z radością ulepszy i nada swoim przyjaciołom nowy, świeży wygląd.

programme.title: AnimaCars Discovery
programme.desc: Poznaj Jonny'ego Toolboxa i AnimaCars i dołącz do ich licznych misji ratunkowych, aby przywrócić spokój w Animatown!

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: Wszyscy w Samochodzikowie troszczą się o siebie nawzajem. Patrol to specjalny zespół, który dba o bezpieczeństwo mieszkańców.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Zespół budowlany buduje Samochodzikowo cegła po cegle! Pokazują, że wszystko jest możliwe z pomocą naszych przyjaciół.

programme.title: Learning with AnimaCars
programme.desc: Odkryjmy liczby, litery, kolory i kształty poprzez zabawne i ekscytujące zadania na świeżym powietrzu z załogą AnimaCars!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Poznaj Monster Trucks, ciężko pracujące samochody, które łączą siły, aby pomóc przyjaciołom i mieszkańcom Monster City.

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.desc: Wszyscy na pokład ekspresu edukacyjnego! Ted to pociąg, który uczy dzieci o kolorach, zwierzętach, owocach, warzywach i nie tylko.

programme.desc: Poznaj Jonny'ego Toolboxa i AnimaCars i dołącz do ich licznych misji ratunkowych, aby przywrócić spokój w Animatown!

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: Wszyscy w Samochodzikowie troszczą się o siebie nawzajem. Patrol to specjalny zespół, który dba o bezpieczeństwo mieszkańców.

programme.title: Carl the Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego transformacje na ratunek! Gdy Samochodzikowo potrzebuje pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Learning with AnimaCars
programme.desc: Odkryjmy liczby, litery, kolory i kształty poprzez zabawne i ekscytujące zadania na świeżym powietrzu z załogą AnimaCars!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Poznaj Monster Trucks, ciężko pracujące samochody, które łączą siły, aby pomóc przyjaciołom i mieszkańcom Monster City.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Robo wraz ze swoimi lojalnymi przyjaciółmi chroni Samochodzikowo przed planami Zitrona, chcącego ukraść źródło energii miasta.

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Poznaj Toma, wynalazcę z Samochodzikowa! W swoim nowoczesnym laboratorium tworzy wynalazki, aby rozwiązać problemy przyjaciół.

programme.title: Tom's Garage
programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck pomaga swoim przyjaciołom z Car City, gdy ci potrzebują naprawy. Zawsze daje im coś specjalnego po każdej pracy.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Zatrzymaj się w warsztacie Toma Holownika! Ten kreatywny malarz z radością ulepszy i nada swoim przyjaciołom nowy, świeży wygląd.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The Cook You Want to Be
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The Cook You Want to Be by Andy Baraghani! Follow along as Shahir prepares simple and flavorful dishes like a light citrus salad, shawarma spiced lamb chops, clams with crispy ham, and so much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The World Central Kitchen Cookbook
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The World Central Kitchen Cookbook by José Andrés! Follow along as Shahir prepares dishes that World Central Kitchen makes as part of disaster relief efforts all over the world, including beef rendang from Indonesia, lahmajoun from Armenia, potatoes from the Canary Island, and much more!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, Chef Spencer Watts whips up a fast and flavourful Lebanese Take-Out for four people.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Spencer Watts cooks an Indian takeout dinner for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: If you have 30 minutes, then you have time to make Chinese take-out dinner for four people! Chef Spencer Watts cooks up a feast that costs $30.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Salmon Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Salmon is one of the few fish worthy of its own Cook Like a Chef episode; join Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to its many virtues…

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 Lamb Episode with Chef Craig Wong

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Game Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Game meats are on the menu for Chef Derek Dammann in this protein-packed episode of Cook Like a Chef.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Stuffed Olives and Risotto
programme.desc: Italian host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up classy dishes for a gorgeous dinner party in Italy.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Every culture has its version of finger food and in Japan it’s called Izakaya! Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen prepares tapas dishes perfect for nighttime snacking.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: The key ingredient in this episode of One World Kitchen is mangoes! Host Vijaya Selvaraju uses mangoes for some classic Indian dishes.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Endearing host Pailin Chongchinant makes three popular Thai dishes: Coconut Chicken Soup, Green Papaya Salad, and the most famous, Pad Thai.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Endearing host Tyrone Edwards surprises South African-born Shameen Miller with the results of her DNA test. Shameen cooks a meal that combines her two cultures and shares it with her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards shocks Andrea Titus with her DNA results. Blending her two cultures onto one plate, Andrea then cooks up a delicious and revealing meal for her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Collard Greens, Maple Syrup, Goat Cheddar and Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera prepares a frittata, rosemary skewer chicken and grilled bread salad with fresh ingredients from a local farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Broccoli, Rainbow Chard and Herbs
programme.desc: Warm host Amanda Herrera picks up colourful produce and herbs at a farmers' market to make a delicious appetizer and tasty cold oil French fries.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The secluded region of Abruzzo makes for unique Italian cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us diverse regional recipes like Rolled Meat Crepes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Corn: Argentina's favourite ingredient
programme.desc: Corn is a big staple ingredient in Argentinian cuisine, and chef Natalia Machado makes tamales, corn and squash and chorizo stew, chicken in a creamy corn sauce, and then creamy corn pudding for dessert.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Argentinian chef Natalia Machado takes us on a culinary tour of Patagonia as she creates popular dishes from the area, including lamb empanadas, King Crab pie, fish in a salt crust, and Patagonian fruit cake.

programme.title: Mucho Machado
programme.desc: Chef Natalia Machado walks us through a selection of rice dishes including mushroom risotto, paella, and puffed rice cereal!

programme.title: Mucho Machado
programme.desc: Chef Natalia Machado is cooking everything corn including maiz toastado, cachapas, humitas, and her signature pan de elote y rajas!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Three Course Argentinian Meal
programme.desc: Warm host Natalia Machado makes a three course Argentinian meal that reminds her of her family.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Argentinian host, Natalia Machado, exquisitely prepares delicious dishes from Argentina including lamb two different ways.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Charismatic host Jessica McGovern whips up classic desserts from the beautiful city of Paris.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Country fair treats made right at home! Host Jessica McGovern makes tasty fair-inspired desserts like classic Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Which tasty treats tantalize your taste buds? Sweet and salty ones, of course! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourites.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Nothing is more mesmerizing than outer space! Host Jessica McGovern bakes delicious desserts with a galaxy-inspired twist.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: "A" is on the menu and Chef Robert Jewell takes on this meal challenge with apricots and avocados. First up, Robert cooks a spicy roasted quail and drizzles it with some sweet apricot and calvados sauce. Next, is a meal best served cold! Robert slices up sushi-grade tuna and transforms it into a flavourful tartare, brought to life by rich avocado and refreshing lime. On the side, he adds crusty crostini with savoury soy sauce and sesame oil, the perfect complement for this meltin- your-mouth meal. For his final dish, Robert combines apricots and avocados for an unbelievably tasty dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin picks the letter “D” in this challenge and combines two very different ingredients – dill and duck! But that’s no big dill for Theresa. For her first dish, Theresa uses dill seeds and weed to make a hearty, creamy dill pickle soup. She adds chicken broth and potatoes as her base but makes the soup extra smooth with some sour cream. She tops the soup with dill pickles to add a delightful crunch. Next, Theresa takes duck, a classic French ingredient, and gives it a French Canadian twist – duck tourtière. Using the duck fat to fry up some veggies, she adds red wine to her chicken stock and simmers the meat. Then, Theresa fills a pie crust with this delightful duck...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Showcasing the unique flavours of endive and eggplant, Chef Lauren Gulyas receives the letter "E" for her cooking challenge. She sets sail by creating an endive salad boat, the perfect delivery vessel for her smoked trout with creÌ€me fraiche, and goat cheese with walnut appetizers. She follows up with a stuffed baby eggplant, Moroccan style! Chef Lauren sauteÌs onion and garlic with some smoky sweet paprika and a snip of savoury sage, the aromatic combination lends itself beautifully to the succulent flavour of lamb. For her grand finale, Chef Lauren prepares the pieÌ€ce de reÌsistance using both endive and eggplant.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Italian-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: parm crusted chicken cutlets, roasted fennel, and broken cannoli

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing game day menu! Josh makes PB&J caramel corn, chicken tenders, and an Arnold Palmer, while Erica prepares crab fries, burger-themed egg rolls, and a classic Pittsburgh sandwich!

programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break

programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Extremsportveko "The Beauty of Outdoor Sports"
programme.desc: Today, we travel all the way up to Voss, the adventure Capital of Norway, where the “Extremesportsveko” takes place once a year. During this week, national and international athletes compete and challenge themselves in their elements.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 F3 Asian Championship - Season Wrap Up 2021
programme.desc: In todays Episode we got something for the Motorsports enthusiasts. Earlier this year the Formula 3 Asian Championship took place in the united Arabian emirates an we´re going to have a closer look at what was going on, in our season Wrap Up.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.desc: If one knows in the West above all Iranian moral rigour and war rhetoric, the enduro professionals Anita and Caro Gehrig experience open people, hospitality, great interest in the West and last but not least unconditional passion for mountain biking.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Athlete profile: climber Lindsey Hamm's (USA) journey from concrete to peaks
programme.desc: Mammut athlete Lindsey Hamm, a professional mountaineer and mountain guide, brings a breath of fresh air to the world of mountaineering. This film gives an insight into her life and a recent expedition to the wild Charakusa Valley in Pakistan

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 WOF 2025 #31: DATEV Challenge Roth 2025
programme.desc: The Roth Triathlon took place again on July 6, 2025. The sporting event in this triathlon stronghold has been home to triathletes from all over the world since 1984. It consists of a 3.8 km swim, 180 km bike ride, and 42.2 km run through the Roth triathlon district.

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2020 "Live Summary"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Freeride World Tour 2020 - #1 Japan
programme.desc: The season kick-off of the world’s most important freeride series for skiers and snowboarders will be held at Hakuba (JPN).

programme.title: World Cup - Dubai International Baja Overall Highl
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup - Dunkerque (FRA)
programme.desc: Dunkerque is the venue for the GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup 2024, which brings together the best freestyle kiteboarders in the world. Athletes from all over the world compete for the title and show impressive tricks, power moves and technical skills.

programme.title: Desert Dash Namibia 2024
programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Highlight Show BMX
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2023 - Sibiu (ROU) - 150min LIVEmaniacs Summary
programme.desc: In this year’s anniversary edition, competitors from 55+ nations will be competing, among them the world’s best hard enduro riders like Manuel Lettenbichler (GER), Graham Jarvis (UK), Wade Young (RSA), Mario Roman (ESP), Michael Walkner (AUT).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _06_ World Downhill Skateboarding Champio
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: WHY WE FLY
programme.desc: Ever wondered what goes through someone’s mind as they jump from a helicopter above the Canadian Rockies? Then ride along with the Team KAVU athletes as they wingsuit, skydive, and speedride above scenic Fernie, British Columbia.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2023 Autumn: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean. Get ready for 220km of riding, 30 special stages, exploring North, South, East and West in one mega week!

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2023 Summer: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean. Get ready for 220km of riding, 30 special stages, exploring North, South, East and West in one mega week!

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2024 Summer: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean. Get ready for 220km of riding, 30 special stages, exploring North, South, East and West in one mega week!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WOF 2024 #01: Winter Games New Zealand - Park Jam Team Challenge
programme.desc: Building on the success of the Big Air, get ready for the next thrilling New Zealand Winter Games episode, The Park Jam Team Challenge! Witness the fusion of skill and creativity as Freestyle Skiers and Snowboarders showcase their prowess in this high-energy competition.

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 WOF 2024 #02: Winter Games New Zealand - Back Country Freestyle Challenge
programme.desc: Back to the third episode of the New Zealand Winter Games 2023! This time, we dive into the exhilarating world of Back Country Freestyle, where athletes shows their skills in the untouched winter landscapes in the southern Alps of New Zealand. Get ready for an adrenaline-packed adventure!

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Swatch Catch The Moment - Profile Kassia Meador
programme.desc: "Catch the Moment" profiles athletes from around the world, including American longboard surfer Kassia Meador. Kassia is constantly exploring new creative endeavors and travels the world for surfing and photography trips.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2025 #32: Epic Series - Andorra Epic
programme.desc: The Andorra Epic took place from July 15 to 18, 2025, in the breathtaking Pyrenees. Over four days, riders covered 160 km and 5,000 meters of elevation gain. The event offered world-class mountain biking in the unique atmosphere of Andorra's alpine villages.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 WOF 2025 #33: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships - Erzincan (TUR)
programme.desc: The second round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championship took place under sunny skies high up on Mount Ergan Dağı in Erzincan, Turkey. This was the third visit to the 3 km long track, often referred to as the most difficult in the world.

programme.title: FIA World Championship - South African Safari Rally
programme.desc: The South African Safari Rally 2025, which is part of the FIA World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC), took place from May 18 to 24 in Sun City, South Africa. The rally covers 2,600 km through rugged terrain, picturesque savannahs and challenging off-road stages.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2025 Summer: Full Highlights
programme.desc: The Trans Madeira combines the best that Madeira Island and Porto Santo have to offer with six days of racing in the most diverse terrain in the world! With the addition of a new island, you can expect 250km of riding and more than 30 special stages

programme.title: World Cup - Dubai International Baja Overall Highl
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2020 "Live Summary"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Freeride World Tour 2020 - #1 Japan
programme.desc: The season kick-off of the world’s most important freeride series for skiers and snowboarders will be held at Hakuba (JPN).

programme.title: Far Away
programme.desc: Matthias Haunholder and Matthias Mayr present a big mountain freeski film, primarily shot in Austria. Through stunning ski footage and heartfelt interviews, the film explores the intense emotions of parents and loved ones as they cope with the risks faced by the skiers.

programme.title: E-Bike World Tour 2024
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival, held in Verbier, Switzerland, from August 14-18, 2024, is Europe's premier e-mountain biking event, attracting thousands of participants and spectators. In its sixth edition, the festival features a diverse range of activities.

programme.title: Motosurf World Championship 2024
programme.desc: MotoSurf World Championship in Croatia: This year, when the championship hosted the qualification for the World Games as part of the Championship, 109 racers representing 21 different countries and 3 continents competed in Zadar.

programme.title: Desert Dash Namibia 2024
programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E16 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 8, Finland - U105 (Part 1)
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland - U105 (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 10, Romania (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 11, Romania (Part 2)
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E12 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 12, Curacao (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 13, Curacao (Part 2)
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O’Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E15 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The main event will see two of the light heavyweight division’s most explosive young prospects clash as Romania’s Stefan Latescu (17-3, 8 KO) faces Turkey’s Cem Caceres (16-1, 13 KO). Belgium based Albanian Berjan Peposhi (29-4, 16 KO) will compete in the co-main event. The always exciting featherweight welcomes rising star Ayoub Bourass (14-1, 4 KO) in to make his GLORY debut. International Muay Thai superstar Youssef Boughanem (188-43-8, 120 KO) returns for his sophomore GLORY outing against tough Italian Angelo Volpe (38-5, 12 KO). Former middleweight title contender Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-10, 36 KO) takes on Antwerp’s own Jente Nnamadim (21-5, 11 KO), who comes in to make his GLORY...

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: A five-round heavyweight title eliminator between the number one ranked contender Levi Rigters (18-2, 8 KO) and ‘The Golden Wolf’ Bahram Rajabzadeh (69-3, 61 KO). The winner will face ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven (64-10, 21 KO) on December 7 in the main event of COLLISION 7. In the co-main event of the evening, Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (25-4-1, 13 KO) clashes with Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (23-9, 3 KO) in a monster heavyweight clash with big implication for the rankings. Croatian kickboxing legend Mladen Brestovac (55-14-1, 37 KO) will make his final walk to the ring in his hometown of Zagreb. ‘The Scorpion Sting’ will take on newcomer Karim Dian (16-13, 3 KO) to cap off an illustrious...
